Permit Number: BP-2026-00123
Location: 1234 W Georgia St, Vancouver, BC V6E 4M3
Applicant: ABC Construction Ltd.
Description: Interior fit-out for new corporate headquarters on floors 15-20. Includes structural modifications to internal partitions, electrical, and HVAC upgrades.
Project Type: Commercial Renovation
Estimated Crew Size: 45
Start Date: 2026-05-01
Estimated Duration: 120 days
Notes: Project involves overnight work to minimize disruption to existing tenants.
